questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.final_answer: The image shows the Buckingham Palace, a famous landmark in London.
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Victoria Memorial, which is a large bronze statue of an angel holding a flag, located in the Victoria Memorial Gardens in Buckingham Palace Road, Westminster, London. The memorial was designed by Thomas Thornycroft and was unveiled on 25 June 1926. It is situated in the Victoria Memorial Gardens, which are part of the grounds of the Royal Courts of Justice, known as the Inns of Court.

questions.final_answer: The landmark is located in London, United Kingdom.
questions.rgb_answer: The landmark is located in London, United Kingdom. This can be inferred from the presence of the Union Jack flag atop the statue, which is the national flag of the UK, and the architectural style of the building in the background, which is characteristic of British architecture. The statue itself is known as the Victoria Memorial, situated in Buckingham Palace Gardens, which further confirms its location in London.
